docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF APPEAL OF THE ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SARCENO, VIDEAL AS TO DEFENDANT AQUILINA, THOMAS STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE MAILED (LABOR APPEAL) COURT TRIAL SET FOR SEP-16-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
DEMAND FOR INTERPRETER FILED BY DEFTENDANT
COURT TRIAL CONTINUED TO OCT-18-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT TRIAL
ORDER GRANTING CONTINUANCE OF TRIAL DATE
COURT TRIAL CONTINUED TO OCT-28-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 05 PER DEPARTMENT AT TRIAL

#5 JDG WICK. CSR BRENDA FIELDS. CLERK G. VAN HEST. 10:11 AM C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PLTF PRESENT IN PRO PER WITH SPANISH INTERPRETER, MARLENE MORAN, NOT COURT CERTIFIED, WHO DID NOT INTERPRET ANY OF THE COURT'S COMMENTS TO THE PLTF & DEFT REGARDING THE CASE. DEFT PRESENT WITHOUT COUNSEL. 10:22 AM PLTF, VIDAL SARCENO, SWORN AND TESTIFIED ON HIS OWN BEHALF. 10:30 AM COURT IN THE BEST INTEREST OF JUSTICE DECIDES NOT TO GO FORWARD WITH THE CASE AS PLTF'S WITNESS IS PRESENT IN THE COURT AND COUNSEL FOR THE DEFENSE IS NOT PRESENT. CASE CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 28, 1993 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT 5. PLTF IS TO TRY TO FIND A COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER. IF PLTF FAILS TO BRING A SPANISH INTERPRETER, CASE TO BE DISMISSED.

DEPT 5, JUDGE WICK, CSR BRENDA FILEDS, CLERK, E.MONTI 9:40 AM C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. DEFT PRESENT WITH COUNSEL, ALBERT BOASBERG. NO APPEARANCE BY PLTF. COURT ACKNOWLEDGES FOR THE RECORD THAT PLTF WAS ADEQUATELY INFORMED OF TODAY'S HEARING. 9:42 AM DEFENSE MOTION TO DISMISS W/PREJ IS GRANTED. DEFENSE TO PREPARE ORDER.
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT AQUILINA, THOMAS
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
